creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


png_check_sig function was depricated for some time. 

However, many ports collections (eg. emacs, japanese-ptex) use 
this function. 

Yes, sadly this was not picked up on the test. 

You soulution would fix problems in compiling. 
But most configure scripts will still fail. 
So the benefit of this backward compatibility seems low. 

emacs, japanese-ptex have been fixed. 
japanese-emacs-emcws will be fixed soon. 

Thanks for your suggestions.
